summary: P1.8-10 B2.6/B2.7/B3.2: trim Shop Health subtitle on Home, bump SPS threshold labels to text-xs (12px), unify Decisions sub-tab pills with Báo cáo tab styling.

mappings.criterion: Shop Health card on Home has no multi-sentence explanatory paragraph
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue232_home_polish.test.tsx::omits SPS/AHR domain description paragraphs on Home Shop Health card

mappings.criterion: SPS threshold tick labels render at 12px computed font-size
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue232_home_polish.test.tsx::renders Mega-campaign and Star Shop labels at text-xs (≥12px), not text-[10px]

mappings.criterion: Decisions sub-tabs use same pill classes as TodaysReportPanel switcher
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue232_home_polish.test.tsx::uses btn-primary / btn-secondary pill classes matching TodaysReportPanel

mappings.criterion: WCAG P0-14 pass for SPS labels
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue232_home_polish.test.tsx::renders Mega-campaign and Star Shop labels at text-xs (≥12px), not text-[10px]

mappings.criterion: Snapshot or class assertion on Decisions tab active state
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue232_home_polish.test.tsx::switches active pill class when selecting a different Decisions sub-tab
